title: K-200 Airframe Risk Register
text:
# K-200 Airframe Risk Register

Document number: MD-DOC-477-H. Revision: H. Type: analysis. Author: Nina Schulz. Created: 2023-06-26. Last modified: 2024-05-09. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Airframe subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1127, P-1139.
